ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Maggiolo (1983), he was a man of letters who was later interested in alchemy, and `squandered all his possessions to make gold`. Joined the Ricovrati in 1678.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
